jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Cello
jsonLd.description:
We at Cello are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cello:
Cello is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
